# InspiraLabs (PT Nawa Inspira Digital)

> Mitra digitalisasi Indonesia: software, IoT, desain visual, dan pelatihan teknologi.

## About

InspiraLabs provides software development, IoT solutions, visual design, and technology
workshops. Founded by young Indonesian tech enthusiasts with global-standard engineering
and an educational approach.

## Services

- Software Development: https://inspiralabs.com/#layanan-software
- Robotic & IoT: https://inspiralabs.com/#layanan-iot
- Creative & Branding: https://inspiralabs.com/#layanan-design
- Coding, Robotics & Design Workshop: https://inspiralabs.com/#layanan-workshop

## Products

- SiJagaAir EWS Banjir: https://inspiralabs.com/#etalase
- LMS, Smart POS, Sistem Desa: https://inspiralabs.com/#etalase

## Pricing

Structured pricing for AI agents: https://inspiralabs.com/pricing.md
